faqs.question: How do I upgrade my subscription plan?
faqs.answer: Go to Settings → Billing → Change Plan. Changes take effect immediately. You are charged the prorated difference.

faqs.question: Can I get a refund if I cancel mid-cycle?
faqs.answer: We offer a 7-day money-back guarantee for new subscriptions. After 7 days, cancellations are prorated to the end of the billing cycle.

faqs.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.answer: We accept Visa, Mastercard, American Express, and PayPal. Bank transfers are available for annual enterprise plans over $5,000.

faqs.question: How do I download my invoice?
faqs.answer: Invoices are available under Settings → Billing → Invoice History. Click any invoice to download the PDF.

faqs.question: Does the free plan have usage limits?
faqs.answer: Free plan includes 100 API calls/day, 1GB storage, and up to 3 projects. Limits reset at midnight UTC.

faqs.question: What is the rate limit on the API?
faqs.answer: Rate limits depend on plan: Free=10 req/min, Pro=100 req/min, Enterprise=1000 req/min. Exceeding the limit returns a 429 status. Use exponential backoff.

faqs.question: How do I authenticate API requests?
faqs.answer: Pass your API key in the Authorization header: 'Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY'. Never include your key in query strings.

faqs.question: Which SDKs do you officially support?
faqs.answer: Official SDKs: Python (pip install yourlib), Node.js (npm install yourlib), Go (go get github.com/yourlib). Community SDKs exist for Ruby and Java.

faqs.question: How do I handle pagination in list endpoints?
faqs.answer: All list endpoints return a 'next_cursor' field. Pass it as the 'cursor' query parameter on your next request. An absent cursor means you have reached the last page.

faqs.question: What does error code 422 mean?
faqs.answer: HTTP 422 means Unprocessable Entity — your request was valid JSON but failed validation. Check the 'errors' field in the response body for field-level details.

faqs.question: How do I reset my password?
faqs.answer: Click 'Forgot password' on the login page. Enter your email and we will send a reset link valid for 1 hour. Check your spam folder if it doesn't arrive.

faqs.question: Can I change my email address?
faqs.answer: Go to Settings → Profile → Email. Enter your new email and confirm with your password. A verification email is sent to the new address.

faqs.question: How do I enable two-factor authentication?
faqs.answer: Settings → Security → Two-Factor Authentication → Enable. We support TOTP apps (Authy, Google Authenticator) and SMS backup codes.

faqs.question: How do I delete my account?
faqs.answer: Account deletion is permanent. Go to Settings → Account → Delete Account. All data is removed within 30 days per our data retention policy.

faqs.question: Can I transfer my account to another person?
faqs.answer: Account transfers are not self-service. Contact support with both users' emails and we will process the transfer within 2 business days.

faqs.question: Does the product support real-time collaboration?
faqs.answer: Yes. Multiple users can edit the same project simultaneously. Changes are synced via WebSockets with a maximum latency of 200ms. Conflict resolution uses operational transforms.

faqs.question: What export formats are supported?
faqs.answer: Export to: PDF, CSV, JSON, XLSX, Markdown. Exports are processed asynchronously. Large exports (>10k rows) are emailed as a download link.

faqs.question: Is there a mobile app?
faqs.answer: iOS and Android apps are available. The mobile app supports view and comment actions. Creating and editing projects requires the web app.

faqs.question: What integrations are available?
faqs.answer: Native integrations: Slack, GitHub, Jira, Notion, Zapier, Make. REST webhooks available on Pro plan and above for custom integrations.

faqs.question: Does the product support SSO/SAML?
faqs.answer: SAML 2.0 SSO is available on the Enterprise plan. We support Okta, Azure AD, Google Workspace, and any SAML 2.0 compliant identity provider.

faqs.question: What?
faqs.answer: Please ask a more specific question.

faqs.question: How do I upgrade my subscription plan?
faqs.answer: Go to Settings → Billing → Change Plan. Changes take effect immediately. You are charged the prorated difference.
